title: LSC and Massively Documented LLM Hallucination: A Dual-Interpretation Framework for AI-Assisted Scientific Discovery
description: A publication-grade working paper proposing Massively Documented LLM Hallucination (MDLH) as a formal epistemic-risk framework for AI-assisted scientific discovery, using the LSC neutrino research line as a dual-interpretation case study. The work does not claim that LSC is validated physics or that it is false; it separates unvalidated physics from AI-generated epistemic artifacts.
